semantic.role: Semantic indexing and protocol tooling for repository knowledge graphs.
responsibilities: Manages project metadata and module structure for the ArchSpine indexing pipeline.
Defines provenance and pipeline stages for reproducible semantic contract generation.
Coordinates indexing and documentation generation under the .spine directory.
invariants: schemaVersion must be '1.0.0' to ensure compatible interpretation.
provenance must include both 'ast' and 'llm' pipeline stages.

English.role: Semantic indexing and protocol tooling for repository knowledge graphs.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the configuration schema; fixes interpretation rules.
parameter_definitions.projectName: Identifies the project as 'archspine'; used for routing and namespace scoping.
parameter_definitions.role: Declares the high-level functional purpose of this configuration file.
parameter_definitions.responsibility: Describes the primary deliverable or outcome this configuration governs.
parameter_definitions.modules: Lists indexed source directories and their roles; controls which parts of the repository are included in the semantic graph.
parameter_definitions.provenance: Records when the index was generated and which pipeline stages were applied; ensures reproducibility and auditability.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file establishes the fundamental identity and scope of the ArchSpine project within the repository. Changes to 'modules' can add or remove entire subsystems from indexing, potentially breaking downstream tools that rely on the semantic graph. Altering 'provenance' stages may produce inconsistent semantic contracts if the pipeline is not re-run under identical conditions. The 'schemaVersion' acts as a compatibility lock; deviating from it could cause parsing failures in agents or CI systems. Overall, the file is low-churn but high-impact — any modification should be reviewed against the indexing pipeline's contract.
